account_policy.ira: Tactical sleeve — deploy/accelerate per the posture (tax-free turnover).

regime.action: Deploy on schedule / accelerate low-regret anchors (TREND: the composite is above its 200-DMA).
regime.basis: F+C Thrust ladder (Faber 200-DMA trend + Daniel-Moskowitz 252d-return/60d-vol crash + rising-20-DMA thrust re-entry) on the composite, + exit-only composite-stress overlay — see v23.mjs / FABER-CRASH-STRATEGY.md
regime.note: TREND ✓ · CRASH_OFF off · THRUST ✗ (composite 3% vs 200-DMA, 56% of names above their 200-DMA)

attribution.note: no significant alpha — return is explained by market + momentum + theme exposure (i.e. beta)

signal_backtest.caveat: current-membership universe (selection/survivorship bias) → IC is an UPPER BOUND; prices are point-in-time; live ledger is the unbiased confirmation.

alpha_label.note: current factor read: return is explained by market + momentum + theme (t=1.26) — NOT alpha
